ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the weather event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public user, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset */,
  "reset_token_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date and time of the reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each weather station
Contact email for inquiries related to the station
Date when the station was installed
Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive)
Unique identifier for each weather event type
Severity of the weather event (e.g., low, medium, high)
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public user, admin)
Date and time of the last login
Expiration date and time of the reset token
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the weather observation accessed
ID of the user accessing the weather observation
Date when the observation was accessed
IP address of the user accessing the data
User agent string of the device used to access the data
Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure)
